entry.title: Re: Length Of Service /Age Story Reports
entry.content: Thanks for this, is there anyway of presenting the length of service as years and months e.g. 11 years 2 months?

entry.title: IW73 Plan Total Cost Glitch
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

In IW73 I have jobs that show a Plan Total Cost that goes up exponentially every time I refresh or log back in and access the order. I have jobs up to 58 million that started out at only 15,000. Is this a known bug or could it be from an external app? We use Salesforce too.

entry.title: Inappropriate Content in Candidate Application
entry.content:
We had a situation occur where one of our recruiters discovered an extremely inappropriate image uploaded by a candidate for hire in SuccessFactors Recruiting.  Apparently the candidate uploaded the wrong attachment by accident, as it was an extremely graphic. We are looking for options to prevent recurrence and protect our SFSF users. The recruiter had no prior warning or indication that the attachment was inappropriate.

Just to further clarify:

  1. This was a photograph in SFSF Recruiting, through the Resume Viewer. Viewing the image required downloading it, since it was not viewable in the Resume Viewer.
  2. The attachment didn’t contain viruses or malware, so typical anti-virus logic wouldn’t apply.

Is anyone aware of any existing functionality that might proactively catch something like this? Such as image-based AI recognition of a file that can’t be read through OCR, or perhaps recognize human skin in the image itself?

We discussed this situation with SuccessFactors support already. SFSF does not have this functionality currently or have any plans to do so. The closest thing I could find was Google's Cloud Vision API does have the SafeSearch functionality that could possibly catch this outside of SFSF.

Thanks in advance.

Jay

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content:
Thank you for your quick response 😀

We currently have document split enabled and that is why we have the problem. The customer invoice has more than 999 items and when doing the intercompany it generates us more than one document with the same reference number. When we send those invoices to the Spanish tax office, only one is accepted and the rest are rejected because the invoice is duplicated (same reference number that must match the number of the sales invoice issued). This is the reason why the split document is not useful for us and we need to summarize the accounting document items.

Regards

Juan Pedro

We have blog for CID add on. I think it will help you  https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/ariba-cig-add-on-series-cig-overview/ba-p/13358724

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP career
entry.content: SD is an on premise product; SAP's future is in the cloud.  Have you considered taking SAP Sales/Service cloud free training here: https://learning.sap.com/products/customer-experience/sales-cloud

entry.title: CDN Integration with Accelerator based storefront
entry.content:
Wherever there is any redirection triggered from the the Commerce pods, we observed that HttpServletRequestWrapper.getServerName() does not return the expected Akamai domain but instead returns the internal server name that corresponds to the storefront domain url defined in the cloud portal. 

Can you please provide some guidance on how we can set up HttpServletRequestWrapper.getServerName() to return the CDN domain?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDN Integration with Accelerator based storefront
entry.content:
HttpServletRequestWrapper.getServerName() does not return the CDN domain by default. The method getServerName() in the HttpServletRequest (or HttpServletRequestWrapper which extends it) returns the server name from the HTTP request, which typically corresponds to the host value from the Host header in the request.

Here's how it works:

  • Direct Request: If the client sends a direct request to your server, getServerName() will return the name of your server (e.g., www.yourdomain.com).
  • Request through CDN: If the request is made via a CDN (like Cloudflare, Akamai or AWS CloudFront), the CDN will forward the request to your server, and the value of getServerName() will be whatever was in the Host header sent by the client. This is usually the original domain name requested by the client, not the CDN's domain.

However, if your CDN is rewriting headers (for example, changing the Host header), or if you have specific rules set in the CDN configuration to change the Host header, the behaviour could vary. But under normal circumstances, the method returns the host that the client originally requested, which is typically your own domain.

If you need the actual CDN domain or IP, you might need to check other headers like X-Forwarded-For, X-Forwarded-Host, or CDN-specific headers.

entry.title: Re: Inverse/InverseIF formula in sap analytics cloud
entry.content: Depending on the business model, prices may fluctuate over time. How would you handle the correct weighted average aggregation over Date and still allow meaningful planning? (e.g. changes in units should not change the unit cost but rather the revenues).

entry.title: Re: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please...
entry.content: Worst case you can manually update the metadata in your MDK project by downloading the $metadata and replacing the .xml for the service in the Services folder.

entry.title: Re: How to use an XSUAA instance together with a .NET application

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports License
entry.content:
For development only 1 copy of Crystal Reports is required per Developer.

For distribution for external users see this page:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2015/07/368edae4-597c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Basically each site requires a copy of Crystal Reports.

And keep your application runtime up to date, you can download it from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Here's a blog I wrote for upgrading:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

Which has good info for each update, distribution etc....

entry.title: Re: payment term field displayed; business user want edit...
entry.content:
Hi 

To edit display and optional entry in purchase order, you need to go to spro- material management- purchasing- purchase order 

check which screen layout has been defined at document level and then go to screen layout at document level option make it edit 

It will work for you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using SAP PO/PI 7.5 as Integration platform with in our landscape..

To do AIF(application interface framework) monitoring, to see the end to end message flow from/to S4/ECC regarding outbound/inbound interfaces we have customized Fiori page...

we are using the Fiori page for the following cases..

(i) AIF Messages (ii) AIF Monitoring (iii) Interface monitoring...

In that Fiori page, it shows status of the messages on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. also if someone clicks on SAP PO status "hyperlink" of that specific message then it re-directs to the SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message... it is possible to link SAP backend and SAP PO messsage on Fiori page because message ID for outbound messages is same on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. it is easier to fetch SAP PO status of the specific message...

Fiori page with SAP PO Message status Hyperlink (here "Success" is hyperlink)..

SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message

We are planning to migrate all the interfaces from SAP PO/PI to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)..

Now, what are different alternate options available within SAP BTP to cater this requirement..

1. BTP Based Fiori app 

2. SAP Cloud ALM for end to end monitoring..

AFAIK, the option 1) above is expensive since Fiori developers has to put of lot of efforts to build such app for AIF monitoring.. Could option 2) completely replace the above solution implemented in SAP PO/PI?? Could you please let me know which is better option in terms various factors like Cost, efforts, time to develope/implement, SAP recommendation, standard solution etc.., Thank you!

//Ramu

entry.title: Re: Unidade Basica de Medida - Mestre de Material SAP 4/HANA
entry.content: Boa Tarde

entry.title: Re: Query to get date goods receive date vs inspection start date and inspection end date
entry.content:
Try joins such as

QAMB
|__ QALS
|__ MSEG
      |__ MKPF
      |__ EKBE
             |__ EKPO

entry.title: Re: Runtime for crystal reports 14.2.x on the server
entry.content:
Get the latest CR for VS from here, and please keep it up to date, CR for VS releases about 2 times a year:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See my blog ion upgrading your project.

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

You must update your Reports to CR 2016 or CR 2020, CR 8.5 used legacy database drivers and they will not work with the latest drivers. You will need to update each report manually using CR Designer by selecting Set Database Location. The RPT files keeps internally the client dll used and only way to update them is to use the Designer.

The TLC error is due to mixed runtime files, CR 8.5 cannot be installed on the same PC as current versions.

entry.content: Were you able to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: how to transform xml from one format to other
entry.content:
You can use below XSLT code to covert in required format

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>

<xsl:template match="/Values">
<Values>
<xsl:for-each select="Value">
<xsl:element name="{@AttributeID}">
<Changed><xsl:value-of select="@Changed"/></Changed>
<ID><xsl:value-of select="@ID"/></ID>
<text><xsl:value-of select="."/></text>
</xsl:element>
</xsl:for-each>
</Values>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Disaggregation Expression when Aggr level is NULL
entry.content:
Hello Yogananda,

unfortunately this solution does not work. This expression does not decide on aggregate level whether KF1 or KF2 should be used as disaggregation factor in general. It decides for each object on the base planning level. This mixes the disaggregation factor. I have the same problem as the questioner. Apparently there is currently no solution to this problem.

Kind regards

entry.content:

The error is invalid. FF user is not tagged as controller for any id

Both controller and FF user type is maintained as dialog only

Given all authorization as per previous error screen shots and even tried with SAP_ALL but, same issue.

entry.title: Issue with uploading multiple line items data of Purhase Orders.
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are facing the problem to get all the items data of purchase order into process intelligence. we are uploading the flat csv files, and our input file has all the items with respective to their purchase order. but, after uploading when we are trying the fetch the data into widget of diff po's and their items. it is fetching only latest line item and skipping all the previous one.

ex - For PO - 4500433959 I have 2-line item - 10 and 20. after upload in PI model it is showing only 20 and same happing with other PO's

Kindly let us know if anyone has encountered such a problem and how you did fix it. Your response are much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: VA05 - limit of records (250 000 records)

entry.title: Real Talk with Shilpa & Ananth | Integration Track Leads
entry.content:
We are Shilpa Vij and Ananth Natrajan, Product Managers for SAP BTP Integration Suite. We look forward to the upcoming SAP TechEd Virtual, especially the SAP BTP Integration track. 

Shilpa Vij: I am a passionate dancer and home decor enthusiast, and by profession, I am a Product Manager. I have co-authored two books. Currently, my interest lies in exploring, learning, and showcasing "product management" as an art.  

Ananth Natarajan: I’m a great enthusiast of nature and love every creature of nature. Apart from my Product Manager role in the SAP Integration Suite team, I prefer to travel and explore different places within my reach. 

The Integration track provides an in-depth overview of SAP's powerful integration tools and solutions, focusing on seamlessly connecting applications, data, business partners, and processes across diverse environments. This track covers topics such as event-driven architecture, API management, hybrid integration, and migration strategies, enabling businesses to drive agility, efficiency, and innovation. Through expert-led sessions, attendees will explore real-world use cases and best practices, gaining valuable insights into leveraging SAP Integration Suite to support digital transformation and optimize business outcomes. 

What inspired you to specialize in this track? 

Explore a diverse array of topics, including AI in Enterprise Integration, API Management, Event-driven integration, Integration Advisor, Trading Partner Management, Migration Accelerators to move to the Cloud, Edge Integration Cell, Enterprise Automation with SAP, and beyond. We’re thrilled to work with such exceptional speakers and product managers. Stay tuned for exciting updates and feature releases that we'll be sharing at TechEd! 

How does this track embody the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit? 

Through jump-start sessions, real-world case studies, and interactive discussions, participants learn how to bring their integration ideas to life using the SAP Integration Suite. The track focuses on practical, scalable approaches that empower businesses to solve complex integration challenges, streamline operations, and enable seamless connectivity across cloud and on-premise environments—turning visionary ideas into impactful realities. 

Stay tuned for jumpstart sessions 

IN180 Future-proof your SAP PI/PO investments with SAP Integration Suite 

IN280 Use SAP Integration Suite with SAP IBP and third-party systems  

Track stars (top sessions to keep on your radar):  

  • IN200 | Unleash the power of AI in enterprise integrations 
  •  IN103 | Modernize and elevate to the cloud with SAP Integration Suite 
  • IN101 | Leverage real-time business insights with an event-driven architecture 
  • IN102 | Take control of your APIs with the API Management and Graph capabilities 
  • IN105 | Unleash the power of AI-driven enterprise automation with SAP solutions 

To gain an overview of the SAP Integration Suite, including the latest innovations and roadmap, we encourage you to attend the session 

IN100 | Innovate now with a modern, AI-assisted integration suite 

 What should be in everyone’s TechEd toolkit for 2024? 

  • A coffee cup for early morning keynotes! 
  • The device of choice: Whether it’s your laptop, tablet, or phone, you can tune into TechEd from wherever you are this year! 
  • Bring a spirit of exploration and eagerness to learn: TechEd is your chance to dive into cutting-edge technologies. Be ready to connect with SAP experts, ask questions, and soak up all the knowledge you can!  

Join us in the Integration track and be part of a vibrant community eager to explore the future of seamless connectivity. Dive into sessions that will equip you with the tools and knowledge to master the SAP Integration Suite and discover how it can elevate your business processes. Don't miss this opportunity to engage with experts, exchange ideas, and learn from hands-on demos. Register now and let's unlock new possibilities together! Explore TechEd 2024 session catalog!

entry.title: How to find the Manage My Substitutes feature in My Inbox app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

 

I want to set a substitute with the app My Inbox (F0862).

How can I navigate to "Manage My Substitutes" screen?

 

I don´t get this button displayed in my inbox.

 

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to find the Manage My Substitutes feature in My I...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

To open "Manage My Substitutes" you need to click on your Profile Icon and then, in the dropdown, choose "Manage My Substitutes". 

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Intrastat 201 - Scenario-Specific Roles and Responsibilities
entry.content:
Trond, 

do you know?

if i have a plant in the US in one state, and a subcontractor is assigned to that same plant but has an address in another state, and the subcontractor sends the finished product to a depot in a third state, how would SAP handle the tax determination? Specifically, do i need to create the subcontractor in its own plant to make this work?

And for europe (intrastat), does this work?

Intrastat:

Same as above, but now involving EU countries instead of US states

entry.title: Re: Restricting Coupon Usage to 1 per B2B Unit in SAP Commerce
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Sorting not working on object Page Item table SAP CAP BTP Fiori elements
entry.content: Hi there! Any news about this? We are facing a similar issue, we have custom pages and macro Tables, and none standard funcionality works on these tables (like sort, filtering, and so on) . Neither on dev bas nor in deployed html5 standalone

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: Hi @thomas_jung , same for me as mentioned by @kallesh_kc .

entry.title: Re: Sorting not working on object Page Item table SAP CAP...
entry.content:
In my case, the problem was caused by not having Fiori Launchpad in the client BTP instance. The app is launched on the APP Router as standalone app. It was fixed by placing the following line in index.html of each FE app.

data-sap-ui-flexibility-services='[{“connector”: “LocalStorageConnector”}]''.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Implement Observability in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content:
Please take note of the following information:

The Development Plan is intended for evaluation purposes only and should not be used in production scenarios because it lacks essential cloud features such as auto-scaling and data replication.

Additionally, it has limited ingestion throughput and is not suitable for testing workloads that exceed its 7.5 GB storage capacity.

We currently utilize this plan in our development environment.

If available in your subscription plan (CPEA), you can still use the "SAP Application Logging Service."

Consider migrating to "SAP Cloud Logging," the successor to the SAP Application Logging Service, for access to additional features.

We are uncertain about the retirement timeline for "SAP Cloud Logging." Perhaps @gopalanand can provide further information on this matter.

gm

Have imported the edmx 

package.json

lib/handler.js : 

Service.cds

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi Mr David,

I am Tuan Anh from VietNam.

I am working as a PP consultant at a SAP partner. I graduated from university two years ago from an economics school, which was not related to information technology. However, I was fortunate to have been exposed to SAP while I was still a student, and decided to pursue this career right after graduation.

I have wanted to obtain an SAP certification for a long time, but the cost barrier is significant for a recent graduate like me in Vietnam. Therefore, This will be a great opportunity to obtain an SAP certification while also upgrading my skills.

Please consider my application for certification. Thank you!

Thanks&Best Regard

Nguyen Tuan Anh

entry.title: Run report showing machine time for a mass list of PN#'s?
entry.content:
We have a large number of sku's that go through assembly there is a large variety in what might run one week vs the next. 

 

I can run COOIS to get the list of sku's but cannot figure out how to get the associated machine time? We do have machine time setup in the routings but currently I have to search each sku's routing one at a time. 

I've also tried CA51 but that gives to much information in a format that isn't friendly to work with in excel. 

Any expert advise out there?

entry.title: Re: Can someone explain what the difference is between ap...
entry.content:
Hi,

FI-CAC in S/4HANA on-premise and cloud, private edition offers comparable functional scope like FI-CAX. Main differences between FI-CAC and FI-CAX are:

 - FI-CAC provides best practices content via several scope items (for USA and Germany).

- FI-CAC offers additional modern APIs. These APIs are also provided for the public cloud solution S/4HANA cloud for contract accounting and invoicing.

- FI-CAC has no functionality for balance interest calculation, only document based interest calculation is available (in particular, I have never seen a project in which interest is calculated by the amount. Always by document, so I don't see any difference).

- FI-CAC has no functionality to post requests (transactions FKKORD*).

You can check these details in note 3280146.
Best Regards

#BRIM #FI-CA

entry.title: GroupBy not working
entry.content:
How can i add a option to group by in my list report?

I need this option:

 

 

 

 

 

I tried with annotation below, but didn't work:

@ui.presentationVariant: [{

sortOrder: [

{ by: 'belnr' }],

groupBy: [ 'belnr' ],

visualizations: [{ element: 'belnr', type: #AS_LINEITEM }],

requestAtLeast: [ 'belnr' ]

}]

 I tried to use UI.selectionPresentationVariant, but nothing.

I changed the table type in manifest.json to AnalyticalTable, GridTable... nothing.

I tried in V2 and V4.... nothing.

 

Please help me to achieve this!

entry.title: Re: Returns Warehouse can be used for invoices
entry.content: Hi, thanks for your help.

entry.title: Query to create draft for a child entity in composition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using CAP(Node.js) odata V4 & listReport page template with fiori elements. I have two entities Lets say parent & child, they have a composition relation between them. The child entity table is displayed on the object page and there i have added a custom action button which opens a valuehelp dialog and there user can add multiple entries from the value valuehelp. The reason custom button was added was that it enables the user to add multiple entries in one go and he doesnt have to create it one by one using the create button. When you try to create an entry in child table using create button the call that is sent is this : 

NEW Parent(ID=123,IsActiveEntity=false)/child
i want to replicate this call. I tried using the following but it didnt work :
await this.send({
            query: INSERT.into(`Parent(ID=${req.params[0].ID},IsActiveEntity=false)/child`).entries(data),
            event: "NEW ",
        });
Any ideas how to solve this ?

entry.title: Re: Consuming on-prem OData service though Destination in...
entry.content: I would suggest you read the documentation Consuming the Connectivity Service.

entry.title: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sheets?
entry.content: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sheets?

entry.title: Re: Change-state in goal plan template and how to use this in the performance form at route map leve
entry.content: Hi there. I just went through this for our Development Plan. We noticed that last year only Performance Goals had a goal plan state defined in the xml and wanted the same for our Development Goals. If you don't already have the Goals xml updated with the goal plan state info, unfortunately you'll need to work with a partner on that. You'll want to take all of the permissions already set in the xml and apply those to a Goal Planning state. Then you'll need to define all of the permissions for a Goal Locked state where you mostly would leave as read only for the roles that had more access in the Goal Planning state. SAP won't make that many changes in xml. Once your Goal Plan states are setup, it's pretty simple. In Manage Templates, go to a section that includes one of your Goal Plans and click on Show advanced options. You'll now have a link for Configurations defined for Goal Plan State where you can select the Route Map steps and define which state the form should be in during each one.

entry.title: More questions about downloading the CR Runtime 64bit for 13.0.2
entry.content: I am trying to get an old WebForms app working which was written years ago by people who are no longer here. From what I've been able to determine it uses Crystal Reports for Visual Studio 13.0.2. I found a post from last year, titled Where to download CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_20.msi, which brings up this topic, but I've got some additional questions. I've gone to this page to download the MSI, however it doesn't have version 13.0.2, so I downloaded version 13.0.6 for Visual Studio. (I'm doing development using Visual Studio 2019 Enterprise Edition.) I'm concerned, will this work for me? Or will I have to install version 13.0.6 onto the web server?

entry.title: An error occurred during processing the process step "IC Purchase Order"
entry.content:
Hello - Anyone has idea on this error " An error occurred during processing the process step "IC Purchase Order"

We are implementing Advanced Intercompany Sales Process but facing an issue with process step. created sales order successfully but no subsequent steps generated automatically, as per advanced intercompany configuration guide all master data & configuration is in place.

Regards,

Ashutosh

entry.title: Re: UI Annotation for masking field value
entry.content:
The way you can identify this is by checking your $metadata 

As given below 

 

<Property Name="Password" />
  <Annotations Target="Password" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
    <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.Masked" />
  </Annotations>

 

Determines that a control must not display the actual value in a field with sensitive data, but replace it with a placeholder, for example, *. Use this annotation for sensitive data.

And it's available since: 1.28.1 make sure your UI5 version is higher than this.

class sap.ui.comp.smartfield.SmartField

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC - One central check system for multiple systems on various releases
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

I understand that the best solution for evaluating and migrating ABAP codes in a conversion from ECC to S/4HANA is Remote Code Analysis in ATC.

In this context, regarding using Remote Code Analysis in ATC for the conversion to S/4HANA, I have a question.

What are the SAP hardware and software prerequisites for installing and configuring the ATC Central Check System? I heard that the ATC Central Check System must be configured in an environment similar to the target SAP S/4HANA (latest release) so that it can be compared with the data dictionary, etc., is that true or is there another way/procedure? What is the best way, in terms of agility and cost-benefit, to have the ATC Central Check System?

Thank you.

FAFR

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Sao Paulo Group - Bem vindos ao Grupo de Sao Paulo
entry.content:
Olá pra todos!

Jorge, como vai? Espero que bem.

Responderei tua pergunta, mas com outra pergunta. 
Vamos lá! 😄

Você chegou a fazer uma busca por algum dos centros  autorizado da SAP na parte de treinamentos? Perguntando, pois aqui em S. Paulo, certamente há algumas opções de eventos como treinamentos direcionados, palestras, cursos menores e, claro, as academias voltadas para vários módulos (principalmente aos que você comentou), e também para novas tecnologia da SAP.

De imediato que me recordo voltado para academia seriam a Ka Solution e GPLux.

Outra opção bacana e que seria ótima alternativa de estudo. Mas, não na mesma objetividade da academia. OK? Seriam as SAP University Alliances. Sobre elas, posso te dizer que atualmente, é possível realizar treinamentos dela no formato on-line. Eu fiz e super indico. Achei bem bacana esta modalidade e formato do curso.

Qualquer dúvida, sigo à disposição e espero ter ajudado você e aos demais colegas da área.

Abs!
Mauricio Santana

entry.title: Re: Eclipse, Field for creation user is missing in source...
entry.content: I am running into the same error even after following the above instruction and activating after making the change before trying again.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @Amit56 ,

Try executing npm view @Spartacus/schematics in your console. What is the latest version you are shown? If it's 4.3.8, then you're talking to the wrong server, and you need to take a look at the .npmrc file in the current directory. That's where the npm command (also the ng command) looks to know what repository to query. You need to query the SAP Repository-Based Shipment Channel (RBSC), not the public open source repository. That file also needs to contain valid NPM Base64 Credentials (which you generated as part of these instructions). Check that your user has a license for Spartacus. If you don't, then that's the root of your problem.

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Personnel number CDS view
entry.content:
Hi !

You probably need to be looking at the work force agreement views

For example I_PersonWorkAgrmtToExternalID has the personnel id - but it doesn't necessary map to BP Id

In the view browser, if you search the advanced search settings for Column Name with "Personnel Number" you get ~400 views - might want to simplify to "Personnel". 

BUT a lot of those are not released. 

You can look into a custom cds view with the following data sources

 

 

You might be hitting up against some GDPR restrictions as well

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: How to automate EWM related steps for Deliveries?
entry.content:
Business is requesting if there is a way to automate Delivery process to simplify the Receiving and Goods issuing for WM managed locations.

They want WM locations to have simple steps like the IM location but we cannot eliminate the extra WM-related steps so we are hoping we can automate some of them. Is this possible for S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to automate EWM related steps for Deliveries?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Please check some APPs available that you could use to automatize some important steps related to the Receiving and Good issue for WM-managed locations:

‘Manage Outbound Delivery Orders ’ App: This app allows you to manage outbound deliveries. You can select all items and click ‘Create WTs’ to automatically create warehouse tasks for items that have available stock. This can help to avoid partial picking of the delivery. If you want the system to only create the warehouse tasks if all the delivery items have sufficient stock to be picked, you can enable the flag ‘Completely Pick Warehouse Request’ in SSCUI ‘Change Warehouse Process Type Settings’ (SSCUI 103863).

‘Post Goods Issue – Unplanned’ App: This app supports unplanned goods issues without outbound delivery orders. You can post goods issues for partial quantity or entire quantity. This app also allows you to assign the goods issue to an accounting element like a cost center, internal order, or project.

‘Process Warehouse Tasks’ App: This app allows you to confirm warehouse tasks, which include tasks for picking.

'Schedule Warehouse Task Creation - Picking' APP: With this app, you can create pick warehouse tasks automatically in the background in defined time intervals. By doing this, you can avoid creating tasks manually.

Pack Handling Units – Advanced’ App: This app allows you to automatically pack products into handling units based on predefined packing instructions. This can significantly speed up the packing process and ensure consistency in how products are packed.

Please check some SAP Documentation for further information:

Manage Outbound Delivery Orders

Post Goods Issue - Unplanned

Process Warehouse Tasks

Process Warehouse Tasks - Picking

Process Warehouse Tasks - Putaway

Process Warehouse Tasks - Internal Movements

Feature Comparison for Confirming Warehouse Tasks

Exceptions

Automatic picking in Outbound delivery SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

Automatic Packing for Outbound Deliveries

 

In case this didn't help with your concern that is related to this post, we kindly ask you to follow up on this topic. 

Thank you and best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: double consumption
entry.content: hello thank you for responding The issue of double consumption with the handheld scanner occurs during the confirmation of item consumption in the picking process. When the operator confirms the consumption, the system sometimes records this action twice, leading to double consumption for a single item

entry.title: Re: Getting "Message no. BFITOOL302" while running F110 a...
entry.content:
Hi

This error occurs because the supplier does not have an email, tell your ABAP to place a break in program LSTXCOTF line 1051 and review the program.
